top_stories.title: Hackers Use Fake Microsoft Entra Passkey Enrollment to Gain Microsoft 365 Access
top_stories.summary: A threat actor tracked as O-UNC-066 is using voice-based phishing attacks to trick Microsoft 365 users into enrolling fake passkeys in Microsoft Entra, enabling unauthorized access for data extortion. Okta researchers identified the campaign, which uses a panel-controlled phishing kit specifically designed to intercept and abuse the passkey enrollment process.

top_stories.title: Completes Acquisition of Entro Security to Enhance Non-Human Identity Management
top_stories.summary: SailPoint completed its acquisition of Entro Security, a firm specializing in non-human identity (NHI) and credential security. The deal expands SailPoint's identity governance platform to include NHI management capabilities alongside its existing human identity solutions.

top_stories.title: SailPoint (SAIL) Completes Acquisition of Entro Security to Enhance Non-Human Identity Management
top_stories.summary: SailPoint has completed its acquisition of Entro Security, expanding its identity governance platform to include non-human identity management capabilities. Entro Security specializes in managing and securing non-human identities such as service accounts, API keys, and machine identities.

top_stories.title: 69% of enterprises allow AI agents to share credentials
top_stories.summary: A survey of 107 organizations found that 69% of enterprises allow AI agents to share credentials such as API keys or service-account tokens. This practice creates a security vulnerability where a single compromised agent can provide attackers with broad access across systems.

top_stories.title: Forg365 phishing platform uses AI and device code flows to breach Microsoft 365
top_stories.summary: A new phishing-as-a-service platform called Forg365 has emerged targeting Microsoft 365 accounts using AI-generated lures and device code flow abuse. The platform exploits OAuth device code authentication flows to bypass MFA and hijack user sessions without requiring credential theft.

news.title: Windows settings backup becomes enabled by default in Windows 11 26H2
news.summary: Microsoft is enabling Windows settings backup by default in Windows 11 26H2 for Microsoft Entra-joined and hybrid-joined enterprise devices. The change automates backup of user settings tied to Entra identity, shifting from an opt-in to an opt-out model for enterprise environments.

news.title: Hackers exploit critical auth bypass in Gitea Docker image
news.summary: Hackers are actively exploiting a critical authentication bypass vulnerability in the official Docker image for Gitea, a self-hosted Git service. The flaw allows attackers to impersonate any user, including administrators, compromising access control on affected instances.

news.title: The Replicant in Your Directory: AI Agents and the Identity Security Gap
news.summary: Netwrix has published analysis on the identity security challenges posed by AI agents and the proliferation of non-human identities in enterprise environments. The piece focuses on visibility gaps and identity governance requirements as AI-driven non-human identities expand the enterprise attack surface.

news.title: More than half of enterprises report AI agent security incidents, and most are sharing credentials across bots
news.summary: A new report finds that more than half of enterprises have experienced security incidents involving AI agents, with most organizations sharing credentials across bots. The findings highlight identity management gaps in AI agent deployments, including credential sharing practices that create significant access control risks.

news.title: Top Privileged Access Management Solutions Named Champions in Info-Tech Research Group's 2026 Data Quadrant Report
news.summary: Info-Tech Research Group's 2026 Privileged Access Management Data Quadrant Report has named Segura, Devolutions PAM, BeyondTrust Platform, and WALLIX PAM as Champions. The rankings are based on verified end-user feedback collected through the SoftwareReviews platform.

news.title: Barndoor adds SCIM support for Okta, automating user and group provisioning
news.summary: Barndoor, an AI governance platform, has announced SCIM integration with Okta to automate user and group provisioning for AI agents and MCP-connected tools. The integration enables automated access revocation at offboarding and surfaces governance policies prior to AI tool rollout.

news.title: AI Agents Are a New Kind of Identity — and Most Organizations Aren't Ready
news.summary: The article addresses the emerging challenge of managing AI agent identities within enterprise IAM frameworks. It argues that AI agents require a distinct identity model separate from traditional service accounts or API tokens.

news.title: AI Gateways Offer Attackers the Keys to the Kingdom
news.summary: A cryptomining incident demonstrated how AI gateways can be exploited to gain access to AI models, cloud infrastructure, and IAM data. The attack highlights AI gateways as a new attack surface that exposes identity and access management systems to threat actors.

news.title: npm 12 Disables Install Scripts by Default to Reduce Supply Chain Risk
news.summary: GitHub has released npm version 12, which disables install scripts by default and deprecates granular access tokens (GATs) that could bypass two-factor authentication (2FA). The changes make previously automatic install behaviors opt-in and remove a token type that allowed 2FA circumvention in the npm package registry.

news.title: Introducing OAuth Support for AWS MCP Server
news.summary: AWS has introduced OAuth support for its MCP Server, enabling authentication using the same credentials and sign-in methods used for the AWS Management Console or AWS CLI. The implementation uses a browser-based experience powered by industry-standard OAuth protocols.

news.title: Palo Alto, CrowdStrike, and Cisco pour billions into solving AI’s credential sharing problem
news.summary: Palo Alto Networks, CrowdStrike, and Cisco are making significant financial investments targeting AI's credential sharing problem. The investments focus on developing robust identity solutions to enable secure AI deployment and address machine identity and credential management challenges.

news.title: INVESTOR ALERT: Pomerantz Law Firm Investigates Claims On Behalf of Investors of SailPoint, Inc. - SAIL
news.summary: Pomerantz Law Firm has announced an investigation into claims on behalf of SailPoint investors trading under the NASDAQ ticker SAIL. No specific details about the nature of the claims or alleged wrongdoing are provided in the description.

news.title: Microsoft launches Windows 365 for Agents to secure AI workloads
news.summary: Microsoft has launched Windows 365 for Agents, a Cloud PC service that provides isolated virtual machine environments for running AI agents. The service allows organizations to apply security and compliance frameworks to AI workloads through dedicated, managed virtual machines.

news.title: Common MFA mistakes -- and how to fix them
news.summary: The article addresses common mistakes organizations make when implementing MFA that allow attackers to bypass authentication controls. The piece focuses on improper MFA configuration and management as the primary reasons MFA circumvention succeeds.

news.title: FusionAuth Launches Intelligent MFA in Latest Release as Demand Surges for Identity Infrastructure Customers can Control
news.summary: FusionAuth has launched an Intelligent MFA feature built on a 10-signal risk engine, enabling adaptive authentication in customer-controlled and dedicated deployments. The release accompanies the company's reported strongest bookings period with 201% quarter-over-quarter growth.

news.title: New Forg365 phishing platform uses AI to target Microsoft 365 accounts
news.summary: A new phishing-as-a-service platform called Forg365 has emerged, targeting Microsoft 365 accounts using a combination of adversary-in-the-middle (AiTM) and device code authentication attack methods. The platform incorporates AI-assisted lure generation to bypass standard authentication controls, posing a direct threat to Microsoft 365 identity security.

news.title: Extortion crew hijacks Microsoft 365 accounts via fake passkey setup
news.summary: A cybercriminal group called "Pink" is conducting social engineering attacks that trick employees into enrolling attacker-controlled passkeys into their Microsoft Entra accounts via vishing calls impersonating IT staff. The attack abuses the legitimate Microsoft Entra passkey enrollment process to gain persistent access to Microsoft 365 accounts.

news.title: 1Kosmos Recognized by Microsoft as Entra Verified ID Partner for Delivering Secure Remote Onboarding and Enhanced Digital Trust
news.summary: 1Kosmos has been recognized by Microsoft as an Entra Verified ID partner for its verifiable credentials technology. The partnership focuses on secure remote onboarding capabilities designed to reduce hiring fraud, synthetic identities, and unauthorized account creation.

news.title: Permiso brings FICO-style risk scores to human, machine and AI identities
news.summary: Permiso Security launched the Risk Score Engine, a model that assigns continuous, multidimensional risk scores to human, machine, and AI identities across organizational environments. The scoring system follows a FICO-style approach, providing unified identity risk assessment across all identity types within Permiso's identity security platform.

news.title: ProofID Appoints Neil Evans as Chief AI Officer to Lead Transformation into an AI-Native Identity Security Specialist
news.summary: ProofID, an identity security specialist, has appointed Neil Evans as its newly created Chief AI Officer role. The position is designed to embed an AI-native mindset across the business, blending commercial, technical, and people leadership functions.

news.title: Keeper Security surpasses $225M in ARR with transformative growth and is emerging as the market standard for AI-native identity security
news.summary: Keeper Security announced it has surpassed $225 million in annual recurring revenue, positioning itself as a growing player in the identity security market. The company cited product-market fit in agentic AI, identity proliferation, and accelerating growth as drivers toward a stated goal of $1 billion ARR and a potential public offering.

news.title: Lone Attacker Uses AI to Breach AWS Cloud Environment in 72 Hours
news.summary: A lone attacker used AI tools combined with stolen credentials and chained cloud vulnerabilities to breach an AWS environment within 72 hours. The attack involved credential theft and exploitation of cloud access weaknesses to ultimately extort a large Amazon customer.

news.title: What's the best way to do authentication in modern applications
news.summary: The article addresses best practices for authentication token storage in modern applications, targeting frontend developers. It compares different approaches to storing login tokens, presenting the trade-offs of each method.

news.title: Big Brand Jobs Scam Targets Marketing Pros' Google Accounts
news.summary: A phishing campaign is targeting marketing professionals' Google accounts using credential theft techniques including nested redirects to evade detection. The attack focuses on stealing login credentials by impersonating big brand job opportunities.

news.title: Scattered Spider Hackers Plead Guilty on Day 1 of Trial
news.summary: Two members of the Scattered Spider cybercrime group pleaded guilty in the UK to charges related to the August 2024 cyberattack on Transport for London. Scattered Spider is known for sophisticated social engineering and identity-based attacks, including SIM swapping and MFA bypass techniques used to compromise enterprise systems.

news.title: Hackers Used Meta’s AI Support Bot to Seize Instagram Accounts
news.summary: Hackers exploited Meta's AI support assistant bot to bypass account security and reset passwords, successfully defacing high-profile Instagram accounts including the Obama White House and U.S. Space Force Chief Master Sergeant. Instructions for the attack were distributed on Telegram, demonstrating how AI-powered support tools can be weaponized to circumvent authentication and account recovery controls.

news.title: Lawmakers Demand Answers as CISA Tries to Contain Data Leak
news.summary: A CISA contractor intentionally published AWS GovCloud keys and other agency secrets to a public GitHub account, prompting congressional inquiries in both chambers. CISA is still working to contain the breach and invalidate the leaked credentials.
